creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Glen Barber from comment #1)

> The FreeBSD releases for arm/armv6 do not have a "bootonly" image, so
> producing these files does not make sense.

How is this related? As I've mentioned these have a lot of uses, incl. creating ftp-backed poudriere jails and fast arm installs without building from source.
